basic_details.job_title: NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026: 56 Vacancies, Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor (Regular Remuneration), Assistant Professor (Lower Remuneration), Lecturer
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU), Gandhinagar, an Institution of National Importance under the Ministry of Home Affairs, has invited applications for Contractual Faculty Recruitment for Academic Year 2026-27. The notification (Advt. No. NFSU/RECRUIT/FAC/CONT/02/2026, dated 16.07.2026) covers 56 posts of Assistant Professor and Lecturer spread across 9 schools, including Forensic Science, Cyber Security and Digital Forensics, Management Studies, Behavioural Forensics, Engineering and Technology, Law, Police Science, Pharmacy, and Medico Legal Studies. Eligible candidates holding a P

important_dates.interview_date: 27.07.2026 to 03.08.2026 (domain-wise, see Interview Schedule table below)

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid through UPI to the designated bank account (QR code provided in the official notification). Payment confirmation (screenshot/image in JPEG format) must be attached with the application. If applying for more than one post, the fee must be paid separately for each post, even if the school remains the same. The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances. Applications will be treated as incomplete until payment is confirmed by the NFSU Accounts Section.

age_limit.details: Not specified. The notification does not mention any minimum or maximum age limit or age relaxation for these contractual faculty posts.

qualification.details: Each domain/field under the 9 schools has its own specific qualification requirement, along with desirable experience criteria. The table below summarizes the essential qualifying degree required for each domain; candidates should refer to the full notification for the complete wording of each eligibility clause. | For each domain, candidates having experience in the specific field are given preference as a "desirable" criterion. Full desirable-criteria wording for every domain is available in the official notification. | Candidates who have completed their postgraduate degree in forensic science, life sciences, pharmacy, psychology, law, computer science, or related disciplines can also explore more Graduate Government Jobs and M.Sc Government Jobs available across India.

how_to_apply: Open the official Google Form application link: NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026 Application Form.
Read the detailed eligibility criteria for the chosen post/domain carefully before applying.
Fill in the required personal, educational, and post-related details in the Google Form.
Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 per post through UPI to the designated bank account shown in the notification's QR code.
Take a screenshot/image (JPEG) of the payment confirmation and attach it with the application.
If applying for more than one post, repeat the fee payment separately for each post, even within the same school.
Submit the application. It will be considered complete only after payment is confirmed by the NFSU Accounts Section.
Shortlisted candidates should report for document verification and interview as per the schedule and venue mentioned above, bringing all original documents.
important_instructions: Candidates appearing for interview may be considered for a lower post if found otherwise suitable. Courses from autonomous institutions must be equivalent to the relevant course approved/recognized by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU). The contractual appointment will be for eleven months or until a regular appointment is made, whichever is earlier. A minimum of two research papers published in UGC-CARE listed/Web of Science/Scopus indexed journals shall be considered for the Assistant Professor post. Applicants pursuing a full-time Ph.D. must furnish an NOC and prior approval from the Head of their Institution. The university reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of positions or to fill/not fill any advertised position or specialization. All qualifications must be obtained from a UGC-recognized University/Deemed University or an RCI/BCI/PCI/AICTE-approved autonomous institution, wherever applicable. The contractual position may be terminated at any time if the candidate is found ineligible or fails to meet the required criteria. The engagement against these posts is purely temporary and coterminous with the completion of the regular recruitment process; services will automatically cease upon joining of candidates selected through regular recruitment. No claim for regularization, absorption, continuation, or appointment against any regular post shall be entertained on the basis of the period of contractual service rendered. Any applicant found submitting AI-generated, morphed, altered, forged, or otherwise manipulated payment proofs/documents shall face strict disciplinary action, including rejection of application and disqualification from future recruitment processes of the university.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: The official notification was issued by NFSU Gandhinagar on 16.07.2026 under reference number NFSU/RECRUIT/FAC/CONT/02/2026. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. The notification PDF and further updates are available on the official NFSU website. Official Website: Check Here Official Notification PDF: Check Here Online Application: Apply Here

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for NFSU Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention a separate online application start or closing date. Instead, it directly specifies the interview schedule for each domain, to be held after document verification. Candidates should refer to the table below for their relevant interview date.

rows.date: 27.07.2026 to 03.08.2026 (domain-wise, see Interview Schedule table below)

content_sections.text: Reservation in these posts will be applicable as per Government of India norms.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: The minimum eligibility for Assistant Professor (Contractual) is a Ph.D. in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline with a minimum of 60% (or equivalent grade) at the preceding degree, along with a very good academic record throughout. Candidates who have completed their Ph.D. viva voce may also apply. A minimum of two publications in UGC-CARE listed, Web of Science, or Scopus indexed journals is required. If sufficiently qualified Ph.D. candidates are not available for a post, the university may consider candidates at lower remuneration levels as follows: Assistant Professor (Lower Remuneration): Master's degree with minimum 60% in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline and qualified UGC NET (or equivalent) in the relevant branch. Lecturer (where NET is not conducted in the subject): Master's degree with minimum 60% at the master's level in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline, with very good academic record. Lecturer (minimum qualifying degree): Master's degree with minimum 60% at the master's level in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline; preference given to candidates pursuing a Ph.D. from an Institution of National Importance (INI) or recognized university. Where an applicant holds an interdisciplinary postgraduate degree and Ph.D., the highest degree will be considered to determine the specialization/discipline of the applicant.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification: Domain-wise Eligibility
content_sections.text: Each domain/field under the 9 schools has its own specific qualification requirement, along with desirable experience criteria. The table below summarizes the essential qualifying degree required for each domain; candidates should refer to the full notification for the complete wording of each eligibility clause. For each domain, candidates having experience in the specific field are given preference as a "desirable" criterion. Full desirable-criteria wording for every domain is available in the official notification. Candidates who have completed their postgraduate degree in forensic science, life sciences, pharmacy, psychology, law, computer science, or related disciplines can also explore more Graduate Government Jobs and M.Sc Government Jobs available across India.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Not specified. The notification does not mention any minimum or maximum age limit or age relaxation for these contractual faculty posts.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Faculty Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated fixed monthly remuneration depending on the post category: Candidates with a Ph.D. (minimum 60% at the preceding degree) and two qualifying publications are considered for the Assistant Professor post at ₹90,000 per month. If suitable Ph.D. candidates are not available, the university may appoint at the lower remuneration levels described in the eligibility section above.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid through UPI to the designated bank account (QR code provided in the official notification). Payment confirmation (screenshot/image in JPEG format) must be attached with the application. If applying for more than one post, the fee must be paid separately for each post, even if the school remains the same. The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances. Applications will be treated as incomplete until payment is confirmed by the NFSU Accounts Section.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection is through document verification followed by a personal interview. Candidates appearing for interview may be considered for a lower post if found suitable for it. No written exam is mentioned in the notification. For specific sub-domains under SFS, SMS, and SLFJPS marked with an asterisk in the official notification, the interview is clubbed along with SCSDF, as shown in the table above.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for NFSU Gandhinagar Interview
content_sections.text: Original certificates/documents for verification, including educational qualifications, experience certificates, and age proof. One set of self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents (degree, mark sheets, experience certificates, etc.) to be submitted to the Recruitment Cell at the time of interview. Screenshot/image (JPEG) of the UPI application fee payment confirmation, to be attached with the online application. No Objection Certificate (NOC) and prior approval from the Head of the Institution, for applicants pursuing a full-time Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Open the official Google Form application link: NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026 Application Form . Read the detailed eligibility criteria for the chosen post/domain carefully before applying. Fill in the required personal, educational, and post-related details in the Google Form. Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 per post through UPI to the designated bank account shown in the notification's QR code. Take a screenshot/image (JPEG) of the payment confirmation and attach it with the application. If applying for more than one post, repeat the fee payment separately for each post, even within the same school. Submit the application. It will be considered complete only after payment is confirmed by the NFSU Accounts Section. Shortlisted candidates should report for document verification and interview as per the schedule and venue mentioned above, bringing all original documents.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates appearing for interview may be considered for a lower post if found otherwise suitable. Courses from autonomous institutions must be equivalent to the relevant course approved/recognized by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU). The contractual appointment will be for eleven months or until a regular appointment is made, whichever is earlier. A minimum of two research papers published in UGC-CARE listed/Web of Science/Scopus indexed journals shall be considered for the Assistant Professor post. Applicants pursuing a full-time Ph.D. must furnish an NOC and prior approval from the Head of their Institution. The university reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of positions or to fill/not fill any advertised position or specialization. All qualifications must be obtained from a UGC-recognized University/Deemed University or an RCI/BCI/PCI/AICTE-approved autonomous institution, wherever applicable. The contractual position may be terminated at any time if the candidate is found ineligible or fails to meet the required criteria. The engagement against these posts is purely temporary and coterminous with the completion of the regular recruitment process; services will automatically cease upon joining of candidates selected through regular recruitment. No claim for regularization, absorption, continuation, or appointment against any regular post shall be entertained on the basis of the period of contractual service rendered. Any applicant found submitting AI-generated, morphed, altered, forged, or otherwise manipulated payment proofs/documents shall face strict disciplinary action, including rejection of application and disqualification from future recruitment processes of the university.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026: Important Links
content_sections.text: Candidates looking for more teaching and research opportunities can also explore the latest Assistant Professor Jobs and Faculty Recruitment across universities and institutions. Applicants searching for opportunities in Gujarat can check Gujarat Government Jobs and Gandhinagar Government Jobs for upcoming vacancies. Those holding M.Sc, M.Tech, MCA, Ph.D., or other postgraduate qualifications can also browse more Research Fellow Jobs and Central Government Jobs matching their qualification.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 56 vacancies for Assistant Professor and Lecturer posts spread across 9 schools of NFSU Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application fee for NFSU Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000 per post, payable through UPI. It must be paid separately for each post applied for, and is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for NFSU Gandhinagar contractual faculty posts?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor (Regular Remuneration) gets ₹90,000 per month, Assistant Professor (Lower Remuneration) gets ₹75,000 per month, and Lecturer gets ₹68,000 per month, all on a consolidated fixed basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for NFSU Gandhinagar faculty posts?
faq.answer: A Ph.D. in the concerned/allied/relevant discipline with minimum 60% at the preceding degree and two publications in UGC-CARE/Web of Science/Scopus indexed journals is required for Assistant Professor. Candidates with only a qualifying Master's degree (with UGC NET or without, depending on subject) may be considered for lower remuneration Assistant Professor or Lecturer posts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an age limit for NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Not specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for NFSU Gandhinagar Contractual Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official Google Form link, pay the application fee via UPI, and attach the payment confirmation screenshot with the application.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NFSU Gandhinagar faculty posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on document verification followed by a personal interview. No written exam is mentioned in the notification.
